description: Document the emit-point contract in the telemetry agent docs / guides: emit sites pass raw internal state (numerics, borrowed &str, opaque/opaque_debug borrows); no formatting, processing, allocation, calculation, or cloning at emit; handlers project at event time; durable Capture drops opaque values by design, so tests needing opaque payloads attach event-time handlers. Record the define-then-re-borrow pattern (define_module is the exemplar).
title: telemetry docs: emit-point discipline
